rationale: zondacrypto is not currently present in canonical data. Current evidence supports a limited / crisis classification, not dead: the official site remains live, but Polish prosecutors opened a criminal investigation, reported withdrawal problems and no access to an approximately 4,500 BTC cold wallet, and published instructions for victims including unreconciled withdrawal requests.

entity.summary: Poland-origin, Estonia-registered centralized exchange formerly known as BitBay and Zonda. In April 2026 it entered a major custody and withdrawal crisis after Polish prosecutors opened an investigation and reported that the exchange lacked access to an approximately 4,500 BTC cold wallet.
entity.notes: Do not mark dead yet. The official website is still live and no formal shutdown / bankruptcy / liquidation marker has been confirmed. Status is limited because prosecutor materials and victim instructions document withdrawal problems, an inaccessible approximately 4,500 BTC cold wallet, and losses reported at no less than 350 million PLN. Recheck frequently; potential future reclassification paths are inactive, dead, or scam_rug/insolvency depending on court, regulator, or liquidation evidence.

events.title: BitBay rebranded to Zonda
events.description: The exchange previously known as BitBay moved into the Zonda brand in November 2021, with user login data and platform continuity described as unchanged.
events.notes: Month/day marker follows public reporting of the 2021 BitBay-to-Zonda rebrand.

events.title: Zonda brand moved to zondacrypto
events.description: The Zonda exchange brand later moved to the zondacrypto name; HEI treats BitBay / Zonda / zondacrypto as the same lineage unless later evidence requires a split.
events.notes: The exact source should be upgraded to an accessible official archived page if available.

events.title: Polish prosecutors opened a Zondacrypto investigation
events.description: The Regional Prosecutor's Office in Katowice opened an investigation concerning Zondacrypto, including suspected misleading of users about the purchase and storage of fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies, possible money-laundering-related conduct, reported withdrawal problems, and lack of access to an approximately 4,500 BTC cold wallet.
events.notes: Official prosecutor material reports damage of no less than 350 million PLN and states that the investigation concerns conduct from 2022 onward.

events.title: Victim instructions referenced failed or partial withdrawal requests
events.description: The prosecutor's office published instructions for potential victims, asking them to document when and in what amount they ordered withdrawals from Zondacrypto, including withdrawals that were not fully or partially executed.
events.notes: This is modeled as withdrawal_suspended because official victim instructions and investigation materials document withdrawal failures, but HEI should avoid claiming a final global service shutdown until stronger official confirmation appears.

events.title: CEO reportedly located in Israel during crisis
events.description: Onet reported that zondacrypto CEO Przemyslaw Kral was in Israel while the exchange was described as on the edge of bankruptcy and while the 4,500 BTC reserve-key dispute remained unresolved.
events.notes: Keep this as supporting crisis context, not as the primary status-changing event.

evidence.title: zondacrypto official homepage
evidence.notes: Used to verify that the official site and login/register surfaces remained live when this limited-status record was prepared.

evidence.title: BitBay przeszedl gruntowny rebranding - ma nowa nazwe i nowe plany
evidence.notes: Used for the public BitBay-to-Zonda rebrand marker.

evidence.title: zondacrypto exchange profile
evidence.notes: Used as supporting evidence for the 2014 launch year and BitBay / zondacrypto lineage.

evidence.title: Sledztwo w sprawie Zondacrypto
evidence.notes: Primary official source for the criminal investigation, alleged withdrawal problems, inaccessible approximately 4,500 BTC cold wallet, and no-less-than-350-million-PLN damage figure.

evidence.title: Informacje dla pokrzywdzonych ZondaCrypto sygnatura akt sprawy 2003-2.Ds.14.2026
evidence.notes: Primary official source for victim instructions, including documentation of withdrawals that were not fully or partially executed.

evidence.title: Wiemy, dokad uciekl prezes Zondacrypto. Przemyslaw Kral jest w Izraelu
evidence.notes: Used only as crisis-context evidence for the CEO-in-Israel report, 99% BTC reserve-loss claim, and 4,500 BTC key dispute.

manual_review_checklist: Confirm no existing zondacrypto / Zonda / BitBay entity before canonical append.
Append entity as hei_ex_000216 only if current main still ends at hei_ex_000215.
Append events as hei_ev_000321 through hei_ev_000325 only if current main still ends at hei_ev_000320.
Append evidence as hei_src_000715 through hei_src_000720 only if current main still ends at hei_src_000714.
Keep status=limited until formal shutdown, liquidation, bankruptcy, or permanent service cessation is documented.
Do not set death_reason unless the record is later reclassified to dead / inactive / acquired / rebranded under HEI rules.
